released_recent.name: Meta Fund: WhatsApp Username as BSUID

methodology: Risk and confidence are computed from Jira QA gates: weighted completion across work items (Released 1.0, Pre-release 0.95, QA-passed 0.85, in QA 0.6, code review 0.4, in progress 0.25, to do 0), minus penalties for past postponements and unstaged work close to the Sunday QA gate. A release must be QA-passed on staging before the Pre-release Weekly call to ship that cycle.
